title: Factory Revival
description: like playing Buildcraft and Industrialcraft again.
body:
Take a journey back to the early days of Minecraft factory modpacks with a modern twist! *Factory Revival* combines the essence of classic industrial gameplay with updated mods for Minecraft 1.18. Experience the return of *Buildcraft—*the iconic mod for automation and resource transportation—now revamped for a new generation. Instead of the classic *IndustrialCraft 2*, this pack features *Industrial Reborn*, a modern alternative that captures the core mechanics of IC2, providing advanced machines, energy systems, and automation tools.

Whether you’re a longtime fan of early industrial modpacks or new to the genre, *Factory Revival* offers the perfect mix of nostalgia and innovation. Set up automated production lines, harness power from renewable and non-renewable sources, and build your ultimate factory empire.

### Details
The modpack is using an expermental build of [BuildCraft 7.99.24.9-1.18.2](https://github.com/CalenXwX/BuildCraft/releases/tag/7.99.24.9-1.18.2)
and [Industrial Reborn](https://github.com/Maciej916/Industrial-Reborn/tree/1.18) as an analog for *IndustrialCraft 2*
